session_focus: Distinguish repo layout from concurrency issues before blaming the parent-root git structure.
user_directives: Distinguish repo layout from concurrency issues before blaming the parent-root git structure.
assistant_responses: Determined the layout was intentional and safe; the real bug was overlapping mutating git operations against the same top-level index.
training_value: Shared git roots are fine when writes are serialized.
The git index lock kept recurring, and the question was whether the top-level .git one folder above SPAWN was inherently wrong.
